source_description: Inside an apartment kitchen, Joey sits at the counter eating cereal. Chandler walks in wearing a suit.
Inside an apartment kitchen, Joey sits at the counter eating cereal. Chandler walks in wearing a suit.
Chandler walks past a tall wooden cabinet. His jacket sleeve catches on the cabinet door handle with an audible fabric tear.

"Wow, that ripped," Chandler says, looking down at his sleeve. Joey stops chewing and looks at him.
Joey turns his upper body toward Chandler.
"That ripped real nice," Chandler says. Joey fully turns on his stool to face him.
Joey raises both hands in front of him.
"How many times do I have to tell you? You turn and slide," Joey says, shifting his hands horizontally to demonstrate the motion.
